news.t: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Completes Conversion of Four Mutual Funds to ETFs

overview.description: The JPMorgan High Yield Municipal ETF (JMHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that primarily invests in US municipal securities of varying maturities, exempt from federal income tax. The fund seeks to provide a high level of current income from high yield securities. JMHI was launched on Jul 14, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Completes Conversion of Four Mutual Funds to ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK , July 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the firm has successfully completed the conversion of four mutual funds to ETFs.
